transcript.text:
I think it's almost been 35 years
(This man is serious about Chinese food for 35 years)
(Bbong Saboo)
(Presented by the master)
(The quality jjamppong) Thank you
(The mukbang master tasting the jjamppong master's dignity)
(Master Bbong, I finally realized it)
(Master muk, did you finally get it?)
(Rice is essential for jjamppong...) I think I need some rice
Hi everyone
So for today
I'm here to eat
jjamppong*! *Spicy seafood noodle
(The jjamppong master, 'Bbong Saboo') This is a jjamppong restaurant called ‘Bbong Saboo’
The owner has 35 years of experience in Chinese food
(It is well-known among the jjamppong lovers) I knew it because it was so famous

(It is well-known among the jjamppong lovers) I heard that they have amazing jjamppong
I heard that they make their own broth
Anyway, let's give it a go
('Bbong Saboo' Yaksu Branch)
The menu of ‘Bbong Saboo’!
Oh!
(Summer specials for the upcoming summer) They have cold jjamppong for the summer
(Summer specials for the upcoming summer) I love cold jjamppong
As a place famous for its jjamppong,
there are so many types of jjamppong!
(A variety of jjamppong menus as the jjamppong master) I’ll definitely try the basic jjamppong
Wow, look
There’s also cream jjamppong
(Lots of unique menus...) And cheese tomato stir-fried jjamppong
Today, I'm only going to eat the basic one!
The popular menu here is...

fried eggplant?
(Mini size for 1~2 person) There’s a mini size menu
(Mini size for 1~2 person) Unlike the size small, there’s a mini size
Then...
I'll order this mini size
(Mini killer) for everything I want to eat
- (How can I help you?) - I'm ready to order
(Giant iron plate seafood noodles uploaded January 11) There was radish there
(The staff filmed a mukbang like Tzuyang) I wanted to try it, so I also filmed it
Oh, really? Hahaha
(She's a TikToker) I uploaded it on my TikTok
Oh, really?
(Today's order) Do you have cold jjamppong?
Yes
Bbong Saboo Jjamppong, Spicy Jjamppong, Mild Jjamppong
Fried eggplant and sweet and sour pork

- With Kkanpunggi* and cream shrimp - Okay *Stir-fried chicken with vegetables
- Oh, hello - Hello
(Master Bbong appeared) I think it's almost been 35 years
But still, I've got my basic philosophy
(Jjamppong with 35 years of philosophy...!) about the food I cook
So will you be cooking today...?
- Since you're here, I'll have to do it myself - Oh, really?
- I'll make it delicious - Thank you
(35 years of jjamppong life)
(I'll show you what jjamppong is today...!)
(Korean beef bone broth boiled in the store)
(Mild Jjamppong)
(Bbong Saboo Jjamppong)
(Spicy Jjamppong)
(Cold Jjamppong)
(Only available at 'Bbong Saboo')

(Fried eggplant with a special meat sauce)
(Jjamppong served) Wow, thank you
(Feast of jjamppong) Thank you
I ordered 8 dishes
What should I eat first?
Oh, since their popular dish is this fried eggplant
I should start with this one
Bon appétit
Wow, this broth...
already looks quite rich
As you can see here,
this is proof that the broth is really rich
I think this broth is super rich
(That's a lot of noodles...) The portion is huge!
They pull all the noodles themselves at the restaurant
Apparently, they make noodles without additives

The noodles are so white
It's delicious...!
The broth is
very rich
(Tzuyang’s reaction is also so rich...)
Rather than the refreshing taste
of the typical jjamppong,
this tastes very rich
and deep
(A whole new level of richness...!) The savoriness is amazing and so rich
The noodles are...
Should I say chewy?
And it tastes
a bit savory!
I'll try it with fried eggplant
Oh, what's that?

So delicious!
Let's start with the mussels
(Freshness spreading in the mouth) The seafood is so fresh
If I take a bite of the seafood
I can tell whether it's fresh or not
This is so good!!
(Korean beef bone broth that calls for rice) I can easily have 2 servings of this
(Korean beef bone broth that calls for rice) First with the noodles, and then with rice
Oh, it's so good
Wow, the inside is filled with...
the eggplant juice...!
(Meat sauce that enhances the flavor of fried eggplant) It's topped with a lot of meat
If I eat it with this,
the texture is amazing
Let's try something else
Should I try the sweet and sour pork?

Sweet and sour pork
(The charm of sweet and sour pork eaten with sauce...) I don't really care, but...
I prefer pouring the sauce these days!
The batter is made with glutinous rice
The sauce is so delicious
I don't prefer sauces that taste too sour
(Tastes more sweet than sour) But this is perfectly sweet and savory...
The sauce is so delicious
Kkanpunggi
Let's try one Kkanpunggi
So good...!
Unlike sweet and sour pork,
this doesn't taste that crunchy
(Mouth-watering rice cake-like texture) But it has a chewy texture like rice cakes
The fried chicken inside is really tender
Again, the sauce is so good

(Please give me some rice...) Should I bring some rice?
I heard it earlier
That this broth
is all handmade in each branch
Every morning
(The deep broth that keeps calling for rice...!) It's not just a cold or refreshing jjamppong
But it has a very deep and rich flavor
This is just the right amount of food
Not for me though
This is a serving for 1 person
So...
I think this mini size is perfect for 1 person to eat
But even for 1 person...
I don't think the portion is that small
so it would be perfect for 2 people to order 2 bowls of jjamppong and one of this!
Because I ate something a bit spicy

let's try something not spicy
(Mild Jjamppong with rich soup) Is this called the white soup jjamppong?
The flavor is very strong
All the broth here tastes so savory and deep
(The mild savoriness of Korean beef bone broth...!)
It's great!
This one's spicy, and this one's savory
It's like...
Oh my gosh
(Devastating...) This is just...
(Everything she wears is for single use...) I also got it on here
(Coke) Oh, thank you!
I'm your big fan!
(The staff knew that she drinks piles of Coke) I saw you drinking Coke all the time!
(Let's make a pile of mussels first...)
(Done for today)

(Not just the sleeves, her whole shirt is a mess)
(Don't meet a person like me in your next life...)
The cooler it gets, it tastes better
I'm looking forward to this cold jjamppong!
(Cold jjamppong to kill the summer heat) Wow, it's made with red seasoning
They use thin noodles!
This one has a different type of noodle!
This looks like jellyfish
Jellyfish, right?
It has cabbage and stir-fried onions
(Cold jjamppong that calls for summer) This is going to be very popular in the summer
Wow, this is good
It has a deep jjamppong flavor
and very chewy noodles because the broth is cold
Let's try the cream shrimp
Wow, not only is the batter really big

(Packed with super plump shrimp) But the shrimp inside is so plump and big
(Full of shrimp)
The shrimp doesn't taste mushy
It doesn't taste anything like that
It just tastes chewy and plump
(The coolness of cold jjamppong and the richness of the soup is felt together...!)
What's your secret behind staying skinny after eating so much?
Can you tell me...?
Oh, I'm sorry...
There is...
no such secret...
(0 calories if it's delicious) Just enjoy your food...
Something tastes really spicy!
Which one is it?!
(Haven't even started on the spicy one) I haven't even tried the spicy one, but how's it already this spicy?
(Willingness to show it to you) Can you see that?

They gave me a plum tea!
(Warm plum tea to get rid of the spiciness) I think it's plum tea made from plum extract
I was right!
So good!
(The unknown culprit...) This isn't spicy, then which one is it?
Wow, so spicy!
(She's bad with spiciness) It's kicking in again!
(I wonder how spicy this is...) I think this is going to be really spicy, oh no
(Spicy jjamppong that is overwhelming already...)
This is definitely spicier
You have to mix the sauce LOL
(Haven't even started) Oh, I didn't mix the sauce?
Oh, see that?
These noodles are definitely
thicker
(Spicy) It's too spicy!

(I can't handle this spiciness...)
Let's soothe it with sweet and sour pork
It's a bit spicy
It's an eye-opening spicy flavor!
The broth tastes similar to this one
But the spiciness of Cheongyang peppers kick in
All the dishes...
use glutinous rice
that's super chewy
It's super chewy
This one's...
a little bit heavy on the palate
This one has a spicy kick
If you like spicy food, you'll like this one
I'm so satisfied with today's menu!
I'll give it a full 10 out of 10

(Wow...)
She eats so well! Haha
- How was the food? - Oh, everything was...
so delicious!
Where's the chef?
(He left for another quest...) He had other plans...
(Let's express this gratitude by finishing the food...)
Wow, the broth...
It tastes amazing
The last one!
(The gorgeous finale)
(Finished it...)
(My clothes are also so done...)
(There there) Thank you
I only heard of this place and tried it for the first time
As a real jjamppong specialty restaurant it is,

the jjamppong was really good
They have an extraordinary depth of taste
(Other menus taste as good as the jjamppong!) And the other menus are also so good!
(Taste that will satisfy the jjamppong lovers) For those who like jjamppong,
(That was ‘Bbong Saboo’ with a deep flavor) I definitely recommend you this place
Anyway,
thanks for the food today!
